earlier.headline: Ray Dalio Warns of Debt Cycle Leading to Political Extremism
earlier.body: History shows us that having too much debt during an economic downturn leads to a classic, self-reinforcing cycle where: 1) The empire can no longer borrow the money to repay its debts 2) It prints a lot of new money, which devalues the currency and raises inflation 3) Living standards decline, leading to the rise of political extremism.

stories.headline: Mass US Bee Die-Off Amid Trump Plan to Close Bee Lab
stories.body: Despite suddenly losing 1.6 million bee colonies... Trump WH planning to close USDA’s premier bee laboratory.

earlier.headline: Artemis II Astronauts Splash Down After Moon Mission
earlier.body: Wow! Splashdown! The Artemis II crew has returned to earth after their historic trip around the moon.

earlier.headline: Be Humble: Universe Bigger Than Your View
earlier.body: Be humble. Be teachable. The universe is bigger than your view of the universe. There's always room for a new idea.

earlier.headline: Webb Captures New Image of Galaxy Messier 58
earlier.body: Webb captured this new image of galaxy Messier 58, in both the near and mid-infrared, as part of a treasury of 55 massive, star-forming galaxies.

earlier.headline: Webb Captures New Image of Galaxy Messier 58
earlier.body: Webb captured this new image of galaxy Messier 58, in both the near and mid-infrared, as part of a treasury of 55 massive, star-forming galaxies.

earlier.headline: NASA Artemis II Launches First Crewed Moon Mission Since 1972
earlier.body: NASA officially launches Artemis II rocket, first crewed Moon mission since 1972.

earlier.headline: Webb and Hubble Capture Comprehensive Saturn View
earlier.body: Webb teamed up with @NASAHubble, observing the ringed planet in complementary wavelengths of light to give us a richer, more layered understanding of its atmosphere.

earlier.headline: B Cell Reboot Cures Autoimmune Diseases like Lupus, MS
earlier.body: More success for rebooting B cells towards cure of different autoimmune diseases beyond lupus, MS and others

earlier.headline: Webb Captures Detailed View of Galaxy Messier 58
earlier.body: Webb captured this new image of galaxy Messier 58... data on the properties of these galaxies will add insight to our picture of how galaxies grow.

earlier.headline: Webb's Stunning Image of Messier 58 Galaxy
earlier.body: Webb captured this new image of galaxy Messier 58... adding insight to our picture of how galaxies grow and evolve.

earlier.headline: Webb Captures New Image of Star-Forming Galaxy Messier 58
earlier.body: Webb captured this new image of galaxy Messier 58... The data on the properties of these galaxies will add insight to our picture of how galaxies grow and evolve over cosmic time.

stories.headline: Iranian Family Tied to 1979 Hostage Crisis Arrested by ICE in LA
stories.body: Iranian family with ties to 1979 hostage crisis arrested by ICE in LA, set to be deported, DHS says.

earlier.body: 2 people have been killed in a small plane crash on Catalina Island this afternoon.

earlier.headline: Woman Fights Off Abduction Attempt in Santa Ana
earlier.body: A 21-year-old woman said she was nearly abducted as she arrived at work Tuesday morning in Santa Ana. Police said she fought her attacker off.

earlier.headline: Getty Center to Close for Year-Long Renovation Before 2028 Olympics
earlier.body: The Getty Center... will close for a year for major renovations aimed at enhancing the visitor experience ahead of the 2028 Summer Games.

earlier.headline: CHP Tackles Suspect After Erratic Pursuit Through Orange County
earlier.body: A man was tackled to the ground and taken into custody after leading California Highway Patrol officers on an erratic pursuit through Orange County.

earlier.headline: OCDA Mourns Slain Tulare County Sheriff's Detective Randy Hoppert
earlier.body: The Orange County District Attorney’s Office is heartbroken over the death of Tulare County Sheriff’s Detective Randy Hoppert who was shot and killed...
